title: lazarum mirabile
intro: Lazarum mirabile, also known as Mirabilis jalapa, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, recognized for its unique appearance with bi-colored leaves and vibrant flowers. The plant contains medicinal properties, including alkaloids and glycosides, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lazarum mirabile include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lazarum mirabile include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, often used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and other minor health issues.
